characters.appearance: Black woman in her 30s with a dark complexion and short, curly black hair. She has a friendly, expressive face.
characters.demeanor: Enthusiastic, eager to learn, slightly frustrated when making mistakes.

characters.appearance: White woman in her 30s with a fair complexion and shoulder-length, wavy brown hair. She has a calm, symmetrical face.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue top with a subtle texture.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Office में सबको लगता है मेरी English बहुत अच्छी है। [Everyone in the office thinks my English is very good.]

Character A says: पर सच तो कुछ और ही है। [But the truth is something else.]

Character A says: Meeting में जब कुछ समझ नहीं आता, तो मैं बस यही कहती हूँ... [In a meeting, when I don't understand something, I just say this...]

Character A says: Can you repeat that? [Can you repeat that?]

Character B says: ये ठीक है, but professionals usually say, "Could you run that by me again?" [This is fine, but professionals usually say, "Could you run that by me again?"]

Character B says: ये सुनने में बहुत impressive लगता है। [This sounds very impressive.]

Character A says: Could you run that by me again? [Could you run that by me again?]

Character B says: Exactly! अब इसे try करो। [Exactly! Now try this.]

Character A says: I didn't understand your point. [I didn't understand your point.]

Character B says: इसकी जगह बोलो, "I didn't quite catch that." [Instead of this, say, "I didn't quite catch that."]

Character B says: ये बहुत natural sound करता है। [This sounds very natural.]

Character A says: I didn't quite catch that. [I didn't quite catch that.]

Character A says: मेरी English बुरी नहीं है, बस... confidence नहीं आता। [My English isn't bad, just... the confidence isn't there.]

Character A says: और रोज़ एक real tutor afford करना मुश्किल है। [And affording a real tutor every day is difficult.]

Character B says: इसीलिए तो मैं हूँ! तुम्हारी AI tutor, जो 24/7 available है। [That's exactly why I am here! Your AI tutor, who is available 24/7.]

Character A says: आज ही Supernova try करो। [Try Supernova today.]

Character A says: और बिना डरे, confident English बोलना शुरू करो। [And start speaking confident English without fear.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable workplace insecurity about speaking English.
- Demonstrates the app's core value: practical, real-time correction from an AI tutor to sound more professional.
- Ends with a clear call-to-action, positioning the AI tutor as an affordable, always-available alternative to human tutors.
